title: Shiroko pole
summary:
Shiroko pole (Bulgarian: Широко поле) is a village in Kardzhali Municipality, Kardzhali Province, southern Bulgaria. On the shores of the Studen Kladenets Reservoir of the river Arda south of the village is located the medieval Bulgarian fortress of Monyak.


== References ==
